balance: You can check your account balance from dashboard or mobile banking app.
loan: We provide home loans, personal loans, car loans and education loans.
interest rate: Home loan interest starts from 8.5% per annum.
credit score: Credit score above 750 is considered good.
atm card: You can apply for ATM card through net banking.
net banking: Net banking allows you to transfer money, check balance and pay bills.
upi: UPI allows instant money transfer using mobile number or UPI ID.
fixed deposit: Fixed deposit offers higher interest than savings account.
savings account: Savings account earns interest and allows withdrawals.
customer care: You can contact customer care at 1800-123-456.
